name: telecommunications_predictive_queue_begins_cedar_tru_loy
premise: A Telecommunications response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving telecommunications predictive queue begins cedar tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Priya Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Priya Nielsen, accountable for a defensible call in Telecommunications when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Elliot Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Elliot Alvarez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Telecommunications.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Priya Nielsen must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Priya Nielsen do?
